name: Retrieve Order History Performance Test — POST /api/v1/orders/history
description: Validate order history retrieval via POST /api/v1/orders/history using filtered queries, ensuring average response time, p95 latency, error rate, and throughput meet the NFR targets under a steady read load.
corresponding NFR: Retrieve Order History (Read Operation) — POST /api/v1/orders/history must achieve Avg Response Time ≤ 300 ms, P95 Latency ≤ 600 ms, Error Rate < 0.5%, and Throughput ≥ 100 requests/sec.
preconditions: Users must have historical order data.
Time range must include existing orders.
Read-only API; no authentication required or use static tokens.

input data.auth_strategy: No authentication required; if environment enforces auth, use static tokens.

notes: Defaults applied where required to define the load profile: duration_s=300 and think_time_s=[0.5,1.5]. Throughput is driven to meet the NFR (≥100 requests/sec); concurrency is tuned in the load tool to sustain the target rate while validating latency/error requirements.
